page: Microsoft Azure E2s_v3 is an ESv3-family virtual machine configured with 2 vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The underlying hardware features an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 2.6 GHz. This instance allocates 1 physical core with 2 threads, providing dedicated CPU resources. Cache specifications include 32 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 35 MB of L3 cache. It includes 33 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage.

Benchmark evaluations place this instance's performance in the lower tiers. The single-core CPU performance via stress-ng is measured at 1237.29, categorized as weak, while the multi-core CPU performance drops to a poor rating at 1627.47. Memory bandwidth tests show poor throughput, with read-only large block transfers at 14.08 GB/sec and write large block transfers at 11.06 GB/sec. Geekbench scores reflect similar trends, yielding a single-core score of 1058.0 and a multi-core score of 1279.0.

With an 8:1 memory-to-vCPU ratio, this instance provides a high memory allocation relative to its processing power, making it suitable for memory-intensive workloads that do not require high CPU throughput. However, database operations and web serving performance are limited, as evidenced by a Passmark database score of 634.33 and a static web serving throughput of 1.81 GB/sec. The instance is best suited for lightweight databases, basic caching layers, or memory-heavy development environments where raw computational speed is secondary to memory capacity.
description: Microsoft Azure E2s_v3 is an ESv3-family virtual machine featuring 2 vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Utilizing Microsoft Hyper-V, this instance provides a dedicated physical core with two threads, 35 MB of L3 cache, and 33 GB of local storage with Premium Storage compatibility. Benchmark data indicates limited processing and memory throughput, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 1627.47 and a large-block memory read bandwidth of 14.08 GB/sec. Due to its high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per vCPU, the instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-optimized workloads that do not demand intensive computation. It is suitable for lightweight database operations, caching, and memory-heavy development tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E2s_v3 is a memory-optimized VM with 2 vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8272CL CPU. It features 33 GB of local storage and is suitable for lightweight database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E2s_v3 is an ESv3 VM featuring 2 vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon CPU, designed for memory-intensive, low-compute workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring a high memory-to-vCPU ratio for memory-intensive workloads requiring modest computational power.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8272CL processor with 2 vCPUs and 16.0 GB RAM
High memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per vCPU
33 GB local storage with Premium Storage capability
Dedicated CPU allocation with 2 threads per physical core
Suited for lightweight databases, caching, and memory-heavy development
